quadrants.name: Developer Experience
quadrants.purpose: Tools and capabilities that improve developer productivity.

rings.name: ADOPT
rings.description: Recommended and standard choice for new engineering work.

rings.name: TRIAL
rings.description: Encouraged in suitable projects to build organisational experience.

rings.name: ASSESS
rings.description: Worth exploring, but not yet recommended for broad use.

rings.name: HOLD
rings.description: Avoid for new work unless there is a strong justification.

entries.label: Continuous Delivery
entries.reason: Deliver software in small, frequent, reliable releases.

entries.label: Local Development
entries.reason: Develop and test software locally using containerised dependencies and supporting tooling.

entries.label: Architecture Decision Records
entries.reason: Lightweight way to capture important engineering decisions.

entries.label: Contract-first Development
entries.reason: Define contracts before implementation to improve consistency and collaboration.

entries.label: Azure DevOps
entries.reason: Standard engineering platform for source control, planning and delivery.

entries.label: TypeSpec
entries.reason: Contract-first API definitions with generated OpenAPI and documentation.

entries.label: LaunchDarkly
entries.reason: Standard feature management platform for progressive delivery.

entries.label: Scalar
entries.reason: Interactive API reference generated from OpenAPI specifications.

entries.label: GitHub Copilot
entries.reason: AI-assisted software development.

entries.label: .NET Aspire
entries.reason: Improve local development, orchestration and observability.

entries.label: .NET
entries.reason: Primary application platform for backend services.

entries.label: Kotlin Multiplatform
entries.reason: Preferred approach for developing cross-platform mobile applications.

entries.label: Sitecore
entries.reason: Strategic content management platform for digital experiences.

entries.label: Containers
entries.reason: Standard packaging and deployment model for workloads.

entries.label: Azure Kubernetes Service
entries.reason: Standard for running containerised workloads at scale.

entries.label: Azure Container Apps
entries.reason: Managed container platform for cloud-native workloads.

entries.label: Azure Functions
entries.reason: Suitable for specific serverless and event-driven scenarios.

entries.label: Cosmos DB
entries.reason: Strategic operational data store for cloud-native services.

entries.label: Dapr
entries.reason: Portable application building blocks for distributed systems.

entries.label: Blazor
entries.reason: Framework for engineering and operational web interfaces.

entries.label: Auth0
entries.reason: Standard identity platform for applications and APIs.

entries.label: Azure Service Bus
entries.reason: Standard messaging platform for asynchronous integration.

entries.label: Azure Event Grid
entries.reason: Standard for publishing integration events.

entries.label: Redis
entries.reason: Distributed caching for performance-critical workloads.
